questions.question: What is the core responsibility of Layer 4 (Transport Layer) inside connection pipelines?
answers: Logical path selection across separate routing nodes
End-to-end communication flow control, segmentation, and error checking
Mapping human-readable domains to server IP values

questions.question: At which OSI layer do network routers primarily operate to forward packages?
What is the exact Protocol Data Unit (PDU) name processed at Layer 2 of the OSI model?
Which protocol encapsulates web traffic inside an encrypted SSL/TLS session framework layer?
What type of intrusion occurs when an attacker intercepts and modifies communications between two endpoints?
What is the primary role of a demilitarized zone (DMZ) inside an enterprise network layout?
answers: To balance bandwidth distributions across edge switch routing points
To host local user database management tables securely
To isolate public-facing servers from the secure internal private network infrastructure
To store system application logs data fields away from internet paths

questions.question: What type of firewall monitors the state of active connections to determine whether to block a packet?
What does the 'Sliding Window' mechanism accomplish inside a TCP session tracking pipeline?
answers: Dynamic flow control to regulate how much data a sender can transmit before an ACK is required
Cryptographic block rotations to shield payload fields
Horizontal expansion of port bounds when traffic spikes occur

questions.question: Which of the following traits characterizes the User Datagram Protocol (UDP) data stream?
answers: Connectionless, lightweight, and lacks delivery guarantees or sequencing
Mandates manual packet handshakes before transmission
Operates exclusively inside Layer 3 routing tracks
Reliable, connection-oriented, and features heavy window sizing flows
